core.label: Ada Fundamentals
core.description: Strong typing, safety features, and Ada's focus on reliability.

topics.label: Installation & GNAT
topics.description: Install GNAT (GCC Ada) or Alire package manager. Ada is used in safety-critical systems.

topics.label: Types & Strong Typing
topics.description: Integer, Float, Character, Boolean, String, and user-defined types. Ada's type system catches bugs.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elsif/else/end if, case, for/loop, while/loop. Ada syntax is explicit and readable.

topics.label: Procedures & Functions
topics.description: procedure (no return) and function (with return). Parameter modes: in, out, in out.

topics.label: Packages
topics.description: Package spec (.ads) and body (.adb) for encapsulation. Ada's primary code organization unit.

topics.label: Records & Arrays
topics.description: Record types (like structs) and arrays with bounds checking. Arrays are always bounds-checked.

topics.label: Access Types (Pointers)
topics.description: Controlled pointer access with access types. Safer than C pointers.

topics.label: Exception Handling
topics.description: raise, begin/exception/when/end. Predefined exceptions: Constraint_Error, Program_Error.

topics.label: Tasking (Concurrency)
topics.description: Built-in tasking with task types, rendezvous (accept), and protected objects.

topics.label: Generics
topics.description: Generic packages and subprograms for reusable code. Instantiate with new.
